name: [GRV-API] Celery Queue Depth Monitor
message:
High Celery queue depth detected.

Queue: {{celery.queue}}
Queue Depth: {{value}} tasks
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

Queue Performance Impact:
- Tasks may be delayed significantly
- Potential worker capacity issues
- Risk of task timeouts and failures

Investigation Steps:
1. Check queue status: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api?env=prod&view=performance
2. Review worker capacity and scaling
3. Check for stuck or failed tasks
4. Analyze task execution patterns
5. Consider scaling workers or optimizing tasks

Queue Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources?env=prod&resource=celery

options.escalation_message: Celery queue depth remains high. Background job processing severely delayed.
